case_title: ANGELA OLACHEA VS. A & A LEGAL SERVICE INC.(CA)

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT A & A LEGAL SERVICE INC.(CA)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLACHEA, ANGELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT A & A LEGAL SERVICE INC.(CA) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED OCT-31-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT A & A LEGAL SERVICE INC.(CA)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-17-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY PAUL ANDERSON SR.--VICE PRESIDENT. NO COST, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $375.00 FILED BY OLACHEA, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT A & A LEGAL SERVICE INC.(CA) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLACHEA, ANGELA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
